titleStmt.title: SII 26.137: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 137. (A.R. No. 129 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This inscription records an order of the king addressed to the Śrī-Vaishṇavar and the temple servants of Tiruvaraṅga in Śōḻamaṇḍalam granting lands situated in the paṟṟu belonging to the sabhā of Kōvaṉputtūr alias Vīrakēraḷanallūr in Pērūr-nāḍu for food offerings daily and on special occasions to the god Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-perumāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉermaikoṇṭāṉ coḻamaṇṭalattut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatiyil śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum cikāriyañceyvārkaḷukkum nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaperumāḷukku
patiyamutu cirappu Amutukku nāḷḷoṉṟukku nel kalamāka Āṇṭoṉṟukku munnūṟṟaṟuppatiṉ kalattukku nām viṭṭa nilamāvatu perurnāṭṭu kovaṉputtūrāṉa virakeraḷanallūr sabhaipaṟṟāy Iṟaṅki nammutāy kiṭanta
nilam rājarājamaṉṉaṟaiyil mutaṟcatirattu nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nilannālumāvum Iraṇṭāñcatirattu nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nilam nālumāvum Iraṇṭāñcatirattu Aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Āka nilam pattumāvum Iṉ
nilam pattumāvum nammuṭaiya janmanakṣatrattile namakku naṉṟāka Udakapūrvamāka tāṉam paṇṇiṉamaiyāl Innilattāl vanta Iṟai puravu sittāyam Elavai Ukavai maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭatuṅ koḷḷātomākavum Immaṉṉaṟai Orupūviḷaiyiluḷ Innilam pattu mā
vum Oru pūviḷaivatākavum Ippaṭi candrādittavaṟ celvatāka cempilum cilaiyilum veṭṭikoḷḷap peṟuvārkaḷḷākavum veṭṭikkuṭuttom Ivai yaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai toṇṭaimāṉ Eḻuttu patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalattu śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
